evals.prompt: Summarize this GitHub PR, open review threads, and missing template fields.
evals.expected_output: Runs PR/MR Reviewer, uses GitHub MCP when configured, summarizes metadata, threads, changed files, and description issues without posting comments.

evals.prompt: Review this GitLab merge request context before code review.
evals.expected_output: Runs PR/MR Reviewer, uses GitLab MCP when configured, captures MR status, reviewers, changed files, and discussions.

evals.prompt: Summarize this Azure DevOps PR and open review threads.
evals.expected_output: Runs PR/MR Reviewer, uses ADO MCP when configured, normalizes active/fixed/closed threads, and checks PR description issues without posting comments.

should_not_trigger: Post these approved review findings as comments.
